HelpSidebar.title: Help
HelpSidebar.exploreDescription: Explore our documentation or contact our team for assistance.

Login.title: Sign In
Login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

LoginOwliver.title: Sign in to Owliver
LoginOwliver.description: Your session unlocks your watchlists and active scans.
LoginOwliver.legal: Owliver watches the security of the State and your AI — what no one else is measuring.

errors.title: We couldn't sign you in
errors.oauth: Google cancelled or denied access. Please try again.
errors.config: Google sign-in isn't configured in this environment.
errors.exchange: We couldn't validate your Google access. Please try again.

Register.title: Create Account
Register.description: Complete the form to sign up

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
ResetPassword.successMessage: If {email} is registered, you'll receive a link to reset your password in the next few minutes. Check your inbox and spam folder.

errors.requestFailed: Couldn't send the link. Try again in a few minutes.

ResetPasswordToken.title: New password
ResetPasswordToken.description: Choose a new password for your account. The link expires in 1 hour.
ResetPasswordToken.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password
ResetPasswordToken.invalidLink: This link is no longer valid or has expired. Request a new one.

Unassigned.metadataDescription: Set up your organization to start running pentests with Owliver.
Unassigned.title: Create your organization
Unassigned.description: You're not part of any organization yet. Create one to get started — you'll be its owner.
Unassigned.error: We couldn't create your organization. Please try again.
Unassigned.footer: You'll be able to invite teammates and manage everything from your dashboard.

Invitations.alreadyAcceptedBody: The link is single-use. Sign in to access the tenant.
Invitations.expiredBody: Ask the tenant administrator to send you a new one.
Invitations.notFoundBody: We couldn't find this invitation. Verify the link or request a new one.
Invitations.existingAccountNote: You already have an account on Owliver. By continuing, we'll add you to this tenant using your current password.

errors.acceptFailed: Couldn't accept the invitation. The link may have expired.
errors.connectionError: Couldn't accept the invitation. Try again.

Forbidden.title: You don't have permission to view this page
Forbidden.description: The role associated with your account doesn't include the necessary permissions to access this resource. If you think this is an error, contact an administrator.
Forbidden.currentRole: Your current role doesn't have access to this section of the platform.
Forbidden.step1: Verify that you're trying to access the correct section
Forbidden.step3: Request the necessary permissions to access this resource
Forbidden.footer: Once you have the necessary permissions, you'll be able to access all corresponding features.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Here's a quick snapshot of your workspace.
Dashboard.membersCardDescription: People with access to this workspace
Dashboard.gettingStartedDescription: A few things you can do from here.
Dashboard.stepMembers: Invite teammates and manage their roles

PendingInvitation.expiresInDays: Expires in {days, plural, =1 {# day} other {# days}}
PendingInvitation.expiresInHours: Expires in {hours, plural, =1 {# hour} other {# hours}}

EditMemberDialog.title: Edit member
EditMemberDialog.description: Update the user details. Changes will apply on save.
EditMemberDialog.photoHint: PNG or JPG. The photo is saved instantly.
EditMemberDialog.supportHint: Cross-tenant access used by the support team. Only visible to superusers.

InviteUserDialog.title: Invite user
InviteUserDialog.step1Description: Enter the email of the new user.
InviteUserDialog.step2Description: Select the role they will have in the team.
InviteUserDialog.step3Description: Review the details before sending the invitation.
InviteUserDialog.emailHint: The invitee will set their name and password when accepting the invitation.
InviteUserDialog.noRoles: No roles available. Create one first in the Roles section.
InviteUserDialog.invitationSummary: Will receive an email with an invitation link.

ConfirmDelete.defaultDescription: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.description: Manage your user profile and personal settings
Profile.dangerZoneDescription: Changing your password is a sensitive action. Make sure that's what you want to do.
Profile.googleConnectedDescription: You sign in with Google; your account has no password.
Profile.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and data. This action cannot be undone.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this organization? This action cannot be undone.

orgName.title: Organization Name
orgName.description: Choose a name for this organization.

orgId.title: Organization ID
orgId.description: Copy the unique identifier for this organization.

orgAvatar.title: Organization Avatar
orgAvatar.description: Upload an avatar for this organization.

maxPages.title: Max Pages
maxPages.description: Documents with more than the specified number of pages will be automatically trimmed. Please
maxPages.descriptionTail: if you need to increase this limit.

webhookKey.title: Webhook Signature Key
webhookKey.description: Used to sign webhook payloads so you can verify their integrity.

Members.title: Members
Members.description: Manage your team members and their roles.
Members.emptyDescription: Invite members to your team to collaborate.
Members.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
Members.deleteFallback: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
Members.cancelInviteDescription: If you cancel, {email} will not be able to use the link they received. This action cannot be undone.
Members.resetDescription: We'll send an email to {email} with a link that expires in 1 hour. Continue?

Roles.title: Roles
Roles.description: Manage your team's roles and access permissions.
Roles.emptyDescription: Roles let you control access permissions for users in your team.
Roles.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
Roles.deleteDescriptionFallback: Are you sure you want to delete this role?

Metadata.title: Owliver — AI-orchestrated automated pentesting
Metadata.description: Owliver audits any site's web security and agentic surface — chatbots and LLM widgets — probing for prompt injection and jailbreaks, and returns an A–F grade with an easy-to-read report.
